title: Sovereign Procurement Trust Room
short: Help serious buyers understand what can be trusted, audited, and safely shared.
problem: Enterprise and sovereign buyers do not buy vague AI claims. They need evidence, boundaries, review logic, and a clear path to due diligence.
mission: Build a procurement trust room that explains the product, proof flow, claim boundaries, on-chain/off-chain split, review controls, and evidence requirements.
why: Procurement trust is a revenue gate. This card shows how the system converts buyer diligence into proof infrastructure.
plans: Route accepted artifact to future procurement workflows
